raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-directed declarative affirmation establishing personal boundaries and releasing assumed emotional labor",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker has previously occupied the role of emotional surrogate for others",
    "Absorbing or stabilizing others' emotional states constitutes a transferable 'frequency' or energetic burden",
    "The speaker possesses the capacity to notice and redirect this process in real time",
    "Maintaining personal wholeness requires actively refusing to hold others' chaos",
    "Metaphors of 'frequency' and 'field' accurately describe interpersonal emotional dynamics"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent within a consistent energetic/therapeutic metaphor system; each sentence logically extends the prior one without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker finds declarative self-statements psychologically effective, operates within a compatible belief system (energy work, somatic therapy, etc.), and the practice does not substitute for addressing actual relational patterns or responsibilities",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The framework leads the speaker to misattribute normal empathy or support as harmful 'absorption,' discourages appropriate emotional availability, or treats metaphorical language as literal mechanism"
}
